}}'''Brooklyn''' is the Gym Leader of [[Laurel Gym]] in [[Pokémon Prism]]. She owns a Totodile that was usually lost in [[Laurel Forest]]. After finding her Totodile, she can be battled. Her Totodile will join the player's team after Brooklyn has been defeated.
